entries.title: Pre-existing cargo clippy --all -- -D warnings failures in nexus-orchestration (60+ errors in tasks/mod.rs + worker/registry.rs)
entries.source: P3 implementer (fullstack-dev) on iteration/v1.46 HEAD 87f00619; pre-existing claim verified by PM against origin/main HEAD 63b36a32 (V1.45 main)
entries.scope: crates/nexus-orchestration/src/tasks/mod.rs (last touched V1.42 P3 aa0574cc), crates/nexus-orchestration/src/worker/registry.rs, plus 2 test files (auto_chain + novel_project_init)
entries.target_date: V1.46 P-last hygiene (or pre-merge fix branch)
entries.note: PM-override basis: failure reproduces on origin/main HEAD 63b36a32 (V1.45 main, post-V1.45 PR #58 merge). Failure is NOT introduced by V1.46 P0/P1/P2/P3/P4. V1.46 P3 work (hermetic research_supervisor_e2e.rs) is clippy-clean in isolation. P3 implementer provided base-SHA repro: `cargo +nightly clippy -p nexus-orchestration --tests -- -D warnings` on 1d776d23 yields 57 lib errors + 4 auto_chain test + 5 novel_project_init test = ~66 errors, all in code untouched by V1.46 plans. To unblock V1.46 ship, fix in pre-merge hygiene branch or fold into P-last scope.
entries.closure_note: Fixed by V1.47 P-last T1 clippy cleanup of 100+ warnings across 18 lint categories in nexus-orchestration; cargo +nightly clippy -p nexus-orchestration --tests -- -D warnings now passes cleanly.
